title: Place statements on separate lines
description: Multiple statements on a single line reduce code readability and complicate debugging. Each statement should occupy its own line to improve code clarity and make it easier to set breakpoints and trace execution.
recommendation: Write one statement per line to improve readability and debugging capabilities.

noncompliant.description: Placing multiple statements on single lines makes code harder to read, debug, and maintain.

compliant.description: Placing each statement on its own line improves readability, debugging, and code maintenance.

checks.message: Place each statement on a separate line for better readability.
